name: FIRST BUSINESS FINANCIAL SERVICES, INC.
business: First Business Financial Services, Inc. is a bank holding company whose wholly-owned subsidiary, First Business Bank, provides commercial banking products and services to small and medium-sized businesses, business owners, executives, professionals, and high net worth individuals. The company's offerings include business banking (commercial real estate lending, commercial and industrial lending, asset-based lending, equipment financing, and SBA lending), private wealth management, and bank consulting services. It operates primarily in Wisconsin, Kansas, and Missouri and does not rely on a traditional branch network.

exposures.sentence: We originate loans secured by commercial real estate, including owner-occupied properties, non-owner-occupied facilities, multifamily developments, 1-4 family residential developments, and construction loans for these types of buildings.

The adoption of artificial intelligence tools by us and our third-party vendors and service providers may increase the risk of errors, omissions, unfair treatment, or fraudulent behavior by our employees, clients, or counterparties, or other third parties.
